topic: A fresh pot of coffee is made before I wake, with two cups already poured.
title: Two Cups Of Coffee Were Already Poured | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I wake to fresh coffee I never made, and two cups poured.
scenes.image_prompt: A kitchen counter at dawn with a steaming coffee pot and two filled mugs, dim grey light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is just me in this narrow apartment.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow apartment kitchen, single chair at a small table, closed curtains, low light, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wake at six every day.
scenes.image_prompt: An old alarm clock on a nightstand reading early hours, dim bedroom, faint window glow, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning the pot was warm and full.
scenes.image_prompt: A glass coffee pot full and steaming on a machine, soft kitchen light, condensation, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
Two ceramic mugs side by side with rising steam, dark counter, harsh side light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One mug always faced the empty chair across from mine.
scenes.image_prompt: A kitchen table with two mugs, one before an empty wooden chair, dim morning light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set up a camera facing the kitchen overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: A small camera on a tripod aimed at a dark kitchen doorway, red light blinking, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage cut to static at three each night.
scenes.image_prompt: A camera screen showing heavy static and scan lines, dim room glow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The second mug began emptying a little by morning.
scenes.image_prompt: A coffee mug half drained with a lipstick faint ring on the rim, low light, shallow focus, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One day a wet ring sat where no cup had been.
scenes.image_prompt: A damp circular stain on a bare table beside the chair, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped drinking it. The second cup still emptied.
scenes.image_prompt: Two mugs on a counter, one clearly lower than the other, grey dawn light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning both cups were waiting, and the chair was pulled out.
scenes.image_prompt: A kitchen table with two steaming mugs and a chair pulled away from it, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
